title: PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides up to $100 on eligible month for prescription assistance; no assistance for pain medication. 950 SE 3rd Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: -Individuals unable to pay for the cost of much needed prescription medication -Once every other month for up to 6 months Hours: Monday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 389-6643 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 389-6643 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in and speak to a receptionist FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Copy of the cost and pharmacy of your current prescription LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Alfalfa, Bend, Powell Butte, Sunriver, Three Rivers, Tumalo and zip codes 97701, 97703 SITE HOURS: Monday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across from Chan's Chinese Restaurant Services: Prescription Expense Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - ID AND DRIVERS LICENSE ASSISTANCE FOOD - FOOD ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND
